user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] System detected Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected for account Northwind Traders. Generating output.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-12 17:26 EST
Subject: Re: Re: competitive positioning Timeline

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about competitive positioning. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
Date: 2024-02-19 17:41 EST
Subject: URGENT: competitive positioning Issue at Northwind Traders

There's been a change in our timeline for competitive positioning. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-04 10:41 EST
Subject: URGENT: competitive positioning Issue at Northwind Traders

Just checking in on the competitive positioning proposal. Our Head of Digital is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

Meeting: competitive positioning Discussion - Northwind Traders
Date: 2024-03-06
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders), Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft)

[00:01:15] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is competitive positioning.

[00:08:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): Let me add some context -- we've been working on timeline constraints and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

[00:13:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is technical validation.

[00:16:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): The timeline for cost optimization is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:18:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): The timeline for budget approval is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:21:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): Let me add some context -- we've been working on stakeholder alignment and found that the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around.

[00:25:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): The timeline for cost optimization is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:27:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): Let me add some context -- we've been working on performance requirements and found that the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk.
